app.name: Tiimo: Daily To-Do List
app.summary: Tiimo helps people turn an overwhelming mix of tasks into a visual daily plan, clearer priorities, and focused work sessions.

supportedClaims.text: Organize daily tasks in a visual schedule grouped by time of day.
supportedClaims.source: Reviewed App Store description and approved visual-planner screen

supportedClaims.text: Turn a brain dump into a planned list of tasks with the AI Co-Planner.
supportedClaims.source: Reviewed App Store description and approved Co-Planner screen

supportedClaims.text: Use a visual countdown timer to stay with the task in front of you.
supportedClaims.source: Reviewed App Store description and approved focus-timer screen

proofs.label: Visual daily schedule
proofs.detail: A Tuesday plan groups tasks under Anytime, Morning, Day, and Evening, with task names and scheduled times visible.

proofs.label: AI Co-Planner task plan
proofs.detail: A user enters several errands and responsibilities, and the Co-Planner returns a structured list with individual tasks and times.

proofs.label: Visual focus timer
proofs.detail: A focus session for Laundry shows its scheduled time, a circular progress indicator, a countdown, and a pause control.

styleNotes: Use an organic creator voice for people who feel overwhelmed deciding what to do first.
Prefer concrete tension such as too many tasks in your head, unclear priorities, or losing track of time.
Avoid medical outcomes, diagnosis claims, testimonials, and productivity guarantees.
Show only approved Tiimo screens and keep every spoken product claim tied to the visible proof.
